---
title: "Nonprofit Packet"
subtitle: "Economics of Generative AI Research Lab"
---

# Overview

This Quarto project assembles the lab direction materials and the current nonprofit formation and IRS submission drafts into HTML and PDF outputs.

## Reports

- `direction_and_mission.qmd`: strategic direction, mission, and research agenda
- `submissions/`: draft formation and IRS submission documents

## Source folders

- `documents/`: background research and internal reference notes, not included in the rendered book
- `submissions/`: filing-ready draft materials

## Rendering

Render the full book:

```bash
quarto render
```

Outputs are written to `_output/`.
